description: A premium, modern, and minimal real estate business website with smooth animations and a professional corporate feel. Features Dark Blue, White, and Gold accents.

surface_strategies.nav_header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0F1D]/70 border-b border-white/10 sticky top-0 z-50
surface_strategies.cards: bg-[#121B2F] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300

components_instructions.buttons: bg-[#D4AF37] text-[#0A0F1D] font-medium px-8 py-3 rounded-full hover:bg-[#F3C94D] transition-colors duration-300
components_instructions.secondary_buttons: bg-transparent text-white border border-white/20 hover:border-[#D4AF37] hover:text-[#D4AF37] px-8 py-3 rounded-full transition-colors duration-300
components_instructions.inputs: bg-[#0A0F1D] border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] focus:border-transparent
components_instructions.icons: lucide-react for UI icons, @phosphor-icons/react for marketing highlights
components_instructions.animations: framer-motion for scroll reveals (fade-in, slide-up), hover effects on cards and buttons. react-fast-marquee for partners/stats ribbon.

hero_background.description: Modern white house with illuminated pathway at dusk. Use for Hero Section.

construction_service.description: Professional construction worker. Use for Construction Services card/section.

manpower_service.description: Construction workers in hard hats. Use for Manpower Supply service.

real_estate_service.description: Modern luxury interior living room. Use for Property Buying & Selling service.

abstract_gold_bg.description: Abstract dark navy blue and gold fluid waves background. Use for CTA section or footer background.

texture_gold.description: Gold metallic texture. Use for decorative elements, icon backgrounds, or subtle overlays.

specific_page_instructions.home: Implement a cinematic hero section. Use the abstract gold background for the CTA section. Ensure smooth Framer Motion reveals for the 3 service cards.
specific_page_instructions.dashboard: Use a control-room layout (Archetype 2 style but with Archetype 5 colors). High density, clear stats, no unnecessary empty space. Use Recharts for traffic analytics. Cardless flat look with 1px border is preferred.
specific_page_instructions.whatsapp_ai_chat: A floating interactive widget fixed to the bottom-right. Include 'data-testid' for testing. Dark mode tailored UI with gold accents.
specific_page_instructions.auth: A luxury sign-in split layout: left side image (real estate or abstract), right side form with glassmorphism over solid dark blue.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testids: MANDATORY on all interactive elements. Example: data-testid='cta-book-demo', data-testid='nav-services'.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure gold text on dark blue background meets 4.5:1 ratio (APCA). Ensure white text over images uses text-shadow or gradient overlay for legibility.
